items.title: Arsene Wenger Names The Only Team Capable of Stopping France At The World Cup
items.summary: Former Arsenal manager Arsene Wenger has delivered his definitive prediction for the final stages of the World Cup, backing France to lift the trophy once again. The current FIF...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Melbourne Renegades BBL team leave Marvel Stadium after 15 years
items.summary: The MCG will become their official home venue although it's understood they will host two games at Junction Oval
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Klopp reveals how Liverpool tried to sign Mbappe
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp says he "flew around in a circle" in a private plane with Kylian Mbappe and his family when he tried to sign him for Liverpool a decade ago.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
